pokemon:wishiwashi.name: Wishiwashi
pokemon:wishiwashi.summary: It’s awfully weak and notably tasty, so everyone is always out to get it. As it happens, anyone trying to bully it receives a painful lesson.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It’s awfully weak and notably tasty, so everyone is always out to get it. As it happens, anyone trying to bully it receives a painful lesson.
When it senses danger, its eyes tear up. The sparkle of its tears signals other Wishiwashi to gather.
When it’s in trouble, its eyes moisten and begin to shine. The shining light attracts its comrades, and they stand together against their enemies.
Individually, they’re incredibly weak. It’s by gathering up into schools that they’re able to confront opponents.
When it’s in a jam, its shining eyes attract others of its kind. The light from its eyes is visible almost 25 miles away.
They’re weak, so they move in schools. However, they can also often be seen all alone, having strayed from the school.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It’s awfully weak and notably tasty, so everyone is always out to get it. As it happens, anyone trying to bully it receives a painful lesson.
